title: The Lonely Encounter
scene_summary: A lonely dog, Duke, meets two stray dogs, Luna and Jasper, in a abandoned alleyway.

characters.name: Luna
characters.personality: skeptical, with a hint of desperation

characters.name: Jasper
characters.personality: rough around the edges, with a soft spot for Duke

dialogue.speaker: Jasper
dialogue.text: Ease up, Luna. He's just trying to help.

dialogue.speaker: Duke
dialogue.text: I mean it. You look lost. And hungry.

dialogue.speaker: Jasper
dialogue.text: Yeah, we're just trying to find a meal and a place to rest.

dialogue.speaker: Duke
dialogue.text: I know how that is. Sometimes it feels like nobody cares.

dialogue.speaker: Luna
dialogue.text: Nobody does. That's the only way we'll survive.

dialogue.speaker: Jasper
dialogue.text: Shh, Luna. You don't have to be so rough.

dialogue.speaker: Duke
dialogue.text: Hey, I get it. We're all just trying to make it.

dialogue.speaker: Jasper
dialogue.text: You know what? Duke here looks like he could use some company. What do you say, Luna?

dialogue.speaker: Duke
dialogue.text: Really? You'd want to hang out with me?

dialogue.speaker: Jasper
dialogue.text: Why not? We're all in the same boat.

dialogue.speaker: Luna
dialogue.text: Fine... but just for a little while. And don't get too attached.
